Container.Name: huntarr-revisited
Container.Overview: Huntarr Revisited — Automated missing-media discovery and quality-upgrade tool for your *arr stack (Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Readarr, Prowlarr and more). Fork maintained by MrJacobarussell.
Container.Category: MediaApp: Video MediaApp: Music MediaApp: Books Tools:

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Web interface port for Huntarr Revisited.

Config.Name: Config Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Huntarr Revisited settings, database, and logs.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that the container process runs as. Unraid default: 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that the container process runs as. Unraid default: 100.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for the container. Example: America/New_York, Europe/London, UTC.
